$comment: Shared render spec for the cinematic audiobook. Read directly by the ffmpeg compositor; mirrored by the bifrost web cinematic view (keep values in sync — this file is the source of truth). All times in seconds, sizes in px at 1080p output.

intro.$comment: Prepended brand card + book/chapter title card. Audio + captions are delayed behind it. Titles resolved from data-library _meta.json + the audio manifest.

outro.$comment: Closing credits card over the hero image, appended after the chapter; the score bed carries through and fades out. Placeholders {book_title}/{subtitle}/{author}/{chapter_of_n}/{chapter_title} are substituted in code.
outro.author: Raël

credits.text: Written by {author} · A Wheel of Heaven production
The full audiobook releases chapter by chapter — subscribe to follow the series.
Narration synthesized with ElevenLabs · Imagery AI-generated · Released under CC0 1.0

endcard.$comment: Up-next teaser slide after the outro, when a next chapter exists. Hero backdrop + 'NEXT' + the next chapter title. Skipped on the final chapter.

thumbnail.$comment: YouTube thumbnail (1280x720) per chapter: hero backdrop + title + chapter-of-N + logomark. Written next to the mp4 as c{n}.{lang}.thumb.jpg.

score.$comment: Subtle musical underscore — VIDEO EXPORT ONLY, never in the web player. Loops under voice + ambient SFX from t=0 (plays beneath the intro cards too). Generate with generate_score.py.

watermark.$comment: Top-left brand lockup (logomark + wordmark SVGs, recolored). Mirrors the web .cinematic__brand.
